title: Those Were the Days
writer: Jack Jordan, Frank Launder, Frank Miller
actors: Will Hay, Iris Hoey, Angela Baddeley
plot: A farce based on Arthur Wing Pinero's play "The Magistrate", in which the son of a stern magistrate visits a music hall against the wishes of his father. In true farcical style, the magistrate too ends up at the music hall, and be...
